templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
templates.description: Allows two parties to disclose confidential information to each other under mutual confidentiality obligations.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement
templates.description: Standard terms for a vendor providing a cloud/SaaS product to a customer, covering service access, support, payment, liability, and termination.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Governs early access to a product for a design partner in exchange for feedback and participation in a product development program.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement
templates.description: Defines uptime and response time targets for a cloud service, along with service credit remedies for missed targets.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement
templates.description: Governs a provider performing professional services for a customer under one or more statements of work (SOWs).

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement
templates.description: Governs the processing of personal data between a data controller and processor, including GDPR/UK GDPR international transfer mechanisms.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Governs the licensing of on-premise or self-hosted software from a licensor to a licensee, as opposed to a hosted cloud service.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Governs a business partnership between two companies collaborating on joint go-to-market or integration activities.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Governs a limited-time trial or pilot of a product by a prospective customer prior to a full commercial agreement.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement
templates.description: HIPAA-required agreement between a covered entity and a business associate governing the handling of protected health information (PHI).

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Supplemental terms addressing the use of artificial intelligence features within a product, meant to attach to an underlying agreement.
